overview: Cockatrice is a SubBoss-class Beast monster found in Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 1050 HP, 26 physical damage, 250 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 5 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack2 at 150% ratio (390 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Fire Breath.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Attack1 (120%), Attack2 (150%), Chase Attack1 (120%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Petrification
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Petrification icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Fire Breath
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Fire Breath. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Fire Breath

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
